'''Yongti''' was a [[Prince/Legends|princess]] of a [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] clan on the planet [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]. During a raid to steal males of breeding suitability from a rival clan, she tried to capture [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]], who was masquerading as a slave. Yongti and her rancor were killed under fire from one of Queen [[Zalem/Legends|Zalem's]] tunneling machines, piloted by [[Vonya]].
